title: Angel Sealing Hex Glyphs to Piano Keys App
display_title: Angel Sealing Hex Glyphs to Piano Keys App
wikitext:
[]: Angel Sealing Hex Glyphs to Piano Keys App             Quote Post by Fredsq » Tue Feb 17, 2015 5:01 pm Yeah, I know, I must have lots of free time. But I did it! I was trying to learn some Unity and to do that I set myself this simple objective: create an app in which you can click the glyphs to set a sequence, then play them in order by clicking the Play key. https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/u/87339433/HexComposer_web/HexComposer_web.html Click a glyph on the bottom section to add a note; Click a note on the playing list to remove it; Alternatively, type the glyph numbers into the text input field, separated by commas or spaces. Try the DSS Choker sequence yourself: 22 27 32 37 01 06 11 16 21 26 31 36 45 50 55 60 65 70 75 80 44 49 54 59 64 69 74 79 43 48 53 63

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Tue Feb 17, 2015 8:32 pm This is amazing. Awesome work, Fredsq!

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Tue Feb 17, 2015 10:38 pm Evangelion wrote: This is amazing. Awesome work, Fredsq!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Feb 18, 2015 10:31 am I'd love to try it out, but this unity web player thing would need 10GB of my hard drive, and I don't even know what it is, so... But I'm sure you did a great job, thank you for sharing!

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Wed Feb 18, 2015 11:18 am robersora wrote: I'd love to try it out, but this unity web player thing would need 10GB of my hard drive, and I don't even know what it is, so... But I'm sure you did a great job, thank you for sharing!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Feb 18, 2015 12:01 pm ^ Ah, ok I'm really bad with Computers so thank you for clarifying... I don't use flash, though. Well, when I tried to install it, there was written that it would take about 10GB... Could it be, that it's that big, because I'm using a Mac?

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Wed Feb 18, 2015 12:56 pm robersora wrote: ^ Ah, ok I'm really bad with Computers so thank you for clarifying... I don't use flash, though. Well, when I tried to install it, there was written that it would take about 10GB... Could it be, that it's that big, because I'm using a Mac?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Feb 18, 2015 1:20 pm As it turns out, my stupidity in terms of Computers struck once again. The size is in fact 7,1MB. I should really learn reading. Sorry for stirring things up. Well, cool thing! Once again, thank you for sharing, and also, thank you for babysitting me. :) It's a pretty cool app!

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Wed Feb 18, 2015 5:46 pm Oooh, this is cool! Nice work. (That DSS Choker sequence though, talk about intense ) Also, I couldn't help myself. I'm sure someone can do a better job too. 56 56 57 59 59 57 56 54 52 52 54 56 56 54 54

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:23 pm Play this very slowly: 49 49 47 40 43 51 49

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:25 pm So the Aliens communicate with each other through music!? What kind of Close Encounters Of The Third Kind BS is going on here?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:27 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Play this very slowly: 49 49 47 40 43 51 49

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:39 pm Bagheera wrote: That does sound familiar . . .

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:39 pm Bagheera wrote: That does sound familiar . . .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Feb 18, 2015 7:52 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Can’t play more than one note at a time on this thing (sounds better with the chords), but otherwise this: http://youtu.be/qOT1xSZ5EA4

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 18, 2015 8:05 pm Curse the internet’s lack of sarcasm recognition.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Feb 18, 2015 8:34 pm Whats the Hex code for ode to joy?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 18, 2015 8:48 pm ^ This: TomasJC wrote: Also, I couldn't help myself. I'm sure someone can do a better job too. 56 56 57 59 59 57 56 54 52 52 54 56 56 54 54

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Mon Feb 23, 2015 10:20 pm This was actually super cool. Does the DSS Choker set invoke any song on the OST?

[]:             Quote Post by Fredsq » Tue Feb 24, 2015 10:33 am Chroma wrote: This was actually super cool. Does the DSS Choker set invoke any song on the OST?
